name: Honest Company, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview of Business Founded in 2012, The Honest Company (the Company, or Honest, or which may also be referred to as we, us or our) is a personal care company dedicated to creating cleanly-formulated and sustainably-designed products for everyone from babies to adults. By combining thoughtful design with science-based innovation, we deliver personal care products for everyone from babies to adults, spanning categories across wipes, personal care, diapers, and beauty.
